input.headline: Why trying too hard may be holding you back at work

raw.headline: Why trying too hard may be holding you back at work

winner: Why did the overzealous employee at the rubber factory get stuck? Because he was trying too hard to make a mark on the eraser.

candidates.text: Why did the overzealous employee at the rubber factory get stuck? Because he was trying too hard to make a mark on the eraser.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific, but the connection between trying too hard and getting stuck on an eraser feels a bit forced. The humor is mild and not particularly strong or clever."}

candidates.text: Well, I suppose if you're always striving to stand out, it can be rather exhausting... especially when the janitor is cleaning your shadow every morning.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke has a mild surprise element and some specificity with the janitor cleaning a shadow, but it's somewhat generic in its message and lacks stronger punch or clearer connection to the headline."}

candidates.text: Even Einstein couldn't solve a Rubik's cube in record time... because he was too busy inventing relativity.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific, but the connection between Einstein and the Rubik's cube feels a bit forced and lacks a clear link to the headline about trying too hard at work."}

candidates.text: Why did the overachiever quit his job? He was tired of working overtime!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 4.5, "reason": "Generic and predictable; lacks surprise and specificity."}

candidates.text: At my job, I'm so lazy they promoted me to Human Obstacle.
